codeReview.summary: The commit correctly redacts createSession secrets after createProfile and updates dependent tests/screens, but one lifecycle path leaves plaintext package secrets retrievable after session reset.

issues.description: applyBridge() clears createSession with setCreateSession(null) but does not clear createSessionPackageSecretsRef. Since getCreateSessionPackageSecret() reads directly from the ref (line 448+) without requiring an active createSession, plaintext packageText/password can remain retrievable after bridge-driven resets (the bridge handler is explicitly invoked on demo snapshot updates at lines 478-480), violating setup-session secret-lifecycle expectations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runtime-worker procedure adherence reporting appears inconsistent for this run.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md line 22 says agent-browser may be skipped only if demo-gallery Playwright also passes, and line 49 requires manual agent-browser verification. worker-transcripts.jsonl:117 for this session shows vitest/tsc commands but no agent-browser or playwright, while the handoff still records "followedProcedure": true.

summary: Most of the requested redaction behavior is implemented, but the new plaintext stash is not cleared on bridge-driven createSession resets, so secrets can outlive the session in that path. Marking the review as fail pending that lifecycle fix.
